title: Life is meaningless without a pursuit — performance equation seed (2019)
html:
Life is meaningless without a pursuit — performance equation seed (2019)

Source: 2019-10-16 Apple Note. Three-line maxim note from HS junior year. Crystallizes the performance equation Yahir would carry forward.

TL;DR

  • "It doesn't matter what happened to you, what matters is what you do about it" — earliest written version of this stoic maxim; reappears verbatim in the 2024 09 12 manifesto five years later.
  • Performance equation: Attitude × Skill × Effort = Performance — multiplicative model (any zero kills the result), borrowed from a coach/teacher.
  • "Success is rented every day and not owned, once you believe it's owned you begin to fall" — anti-complacency rule that prefigures no runway discipline.
  • Dated 2019 HS — predates OSU, FBLA regional run, and the fear of not doing concept; this is rule-formation phase.
  • Functions as a 3-line manifesto — the manifesto style note genre is already operational at age ~16.

Connections

  • — genre
  • fear of not doing — adjacent driver
  • no runway discipline — same anti-complacency lineage
  • 2024 09 12 never forget manifesto — verbatim recurrence 5 years later
  • walk with gods eyes — later evolution of the same energy

It doesn't matter what happens to you — react maxim (2019)
